# Superfocus — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org/

> Superfocus is a browser-based Pomodoro and focus timer app with ambient sounds, task tracking, and productivity analytics.

Superfocus helps knowledge workers, students, and freelancers stay focused with timed work blocks (Pomodoro, Flow, Deep Work), built-in lofi/rain/cafe cassettes, Todoist sync, and session analytics.

## Product

- Name: Superfocus
- URL: https://www.superfocus.live
- Category: Productivity / Focus Timer / Pomodoro App
- Pricing: Free tier (2h/day focus for signed-up users, 1h for guests). Premium $3.99/month for unlimited focus and analytics.
- Pricing page: https://www.superfocus.live/pricing

## Key Features

- Pomodoro, Sprint (15min), Flow (45min), Deep Work (90min), and Marathon timers
- Ambient focus cassettes: lofi, rain, cafe, white noise + Spotify integration
- Task list with Todoist sync
- Productivity analytics, streaks, and leaderboard
- No signup required to try the timer

## Important Pages

- Homepage: https://www.superfocus.live/
- Pomodoro technique: https://www.superfocus.live/techniques/pomodoro-technique
